# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Workflow
on: push
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            .yarn
            package-lock.json
            pipfile*
            *.pyc
            .tox
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/Pipfile', '**/setup.cfg') }}
      - name: Install Python deps
        run: |
          python3 -m venv .venv
          source .venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt && pip freeze > requirements_frozen.txt
